description: skills/misc/git-guardrails-claude-code is absent from plugin.json skills array; CLAUDE.md requires every misc/ skill to be registered
suggested_fix: Add "./skills/misc/git-guardrails-claude-code" to the skills array in .claude-plugin/plugin.json

description: skills/misc/setup-pre-commit is absent from plugin.json skills array; CLAUDE.md requires every misc/ skill to be registered
suggested_fix: Add "./skills/misc/setup-pre-commit" to the skills array in .claude-plugin/plugin.json

description: skills/misc/migrate-to-shoehorn is absent from plugin.json skills array; CLAUDE.md requires every misc/ skill to be registered
suggested_fix: Add "./skills/misc/migrate-to-shoehorn" to the skills array in .claude-plugin/plugin.json

description: skills/misc/scaffold-exercises is absent from plugin.json skills array; CLAUDE.md requires every misc/ skill to be registered
suggested_fix: Add "./skills/misc/scaffold-exercises" to the skills array in .claude-plugin/plugin.json

description: No handoff document format or section structure specified; the skill says 'write a handoff document' without defining what it should contain
suggested_fix: Add a handoff document template with canonical sections: Current State, Open Questions, Suggested Next Steps, Relevant Artifacts

description: Process ends abruptly at step 2a with no loop-close, commit step, or completion signal to the user
suggested_fix: Add steps covering what happens after all sections are rewritten: review with user, handle broken links, signal completion

description: "Add to the appropriate settings file" — 'appropriate' is a vague quantifier; the target file is fully determined by the scope choice in step 1
suggested_fix: Replace with explicit reference: "Add to the settings file for the chosen scope (.claude/settings.json or ~/.claude/settings.json)"

description: "per file/hunk where relevant" — 'relevant' is a vague quantifier inside the sub-agent prompt template
suggested_fix: Replace with "for every hunk that touches a documented standard, cite the file and rule"

description: "picks the relevant skill based on the user's request" — 'relevant' is a vague quantifier
suggested_fix: Replace with "selects the matching skill based on the user's request"

description: "inline it within the relevant decision" — 'relevant' is a vague quantifier
suggested_fix: Replace with "inline it within the decision it directly informs"

description: "all the relevant modules and callers" — 'relevant' is a vague quantifier
suggested_fix: Replace with "every module and caller in the current code path"

description: "print or render the full relevant state" — 'relevant' is a vague quantifier
suggested_fix: Replace with "all state touched by the last action or variant switch"

description: "a brief codebase summary relevant to the issue" — 'relevant' is a vague quantifier
suggested_fix: Replace with "a brief codebase summary covering the affected module and its callers"

description: "trace the relevant code" — 'relevant' is a vague quantifier
suggested_fix: Replace with "trace the code path described in the reporter's reproduction steps"

description: "the relevant modules" — 'relevant' is a vague quantifier
suggested_fix: Replace with "the modules in the affected code path"

description: "understand the relevant area" — 'relevant' is a vague quantifier
suggested_fix: Replace with "understand the affected feature area"

description: "Include relevant inputs, flags, or configuration" — 'relevant' is a vague quantifier
suggested_fix: Replace with "inputs, flags, and configuration values that affect the behavior being reproduced"

description: "Any extra observations relevant to this slice" — 'relevant' is a vague quantifier
suggested_fix: Replace with "observations specific to this slice's behavior or reproduction steps"

description: "domain-relevant nouns, verbs, and concepts" — 'relevant' is a vague quantifier
suggested_fix: Replace with "domain-specific nouns, verbs, and concepts"

description: "terms relevant for domain experts" — 'relevant' is a vague quantifier
suggested_fix: Replace with "terms that domain experts use when discussing the system"

description: CLAUDE.md mandates all misc/ skills be in plugin.json; all 4 misc skills are correctly listed in README.md and skills/misc/README.md but all 4 are absent from plugin.json, meaning plugin installation silently omits the entire misc bucket
suggested_fix: Add ./skills/misc/git-guardrails-claude-code, ./skills/misc/setup-pre-commit, ./skills/misc/migrate-to-shoehorn, and ./skills/misc/scaffold-exercises to the plugin.json skills array
